name: Minimum Window Substring
description: Given two strings s and t, return the minimum window substring of s such that every character in t (including duplicates) is included in the window. If there is no such substring, return the empty string. If there are multiple minimum-length windows, return the one that appears first (leftmost).
signature: def min_window(s: str, t: str) -> str:
constraints: 1 <= s.length, t.length <= 10^5 (handle empty as edge case)
s and t consist of uppercase and lowercase English letters
Expected O(n) time complexity using sliding window
If t is empty, return empty string
